---
pagetitle: "Archive · Rabat Review of Books"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  id: archive-listing
  contents:
    - "posts/essays/**/index.qmd"
    - "posts/reviews/**/index.qmd"
    - "posts/fiction/**/index.qmd"
    - "posts/poetry/**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, author, categories]
  table-striped: false
  table-hover: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="rrb-container">
<div class="listing-page-title">
  <div class="eyebrow">◆ Complete Index</div>
  <h1>Archive</h1>
  <div class="dek">Every piece the Review has published, arranged by date.</div>
</div>
</div>
```

::: {#archive-listing}
:::
